name: tsc-wireshift
description: HTTP/HTTPS traffic interception and analysis proxy - desktop app
author: SURUJ404

scripts.postinstall: node -e "var c=require('child_process');try{c.execSync('wails build',{cwd:__dirname,stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){c.execSync('echo Wails build failed - install Go+Wails+MinGW and run: npm run build',{stdio:'inherit'})}"
